_comments.port: HTTP port for the SSE server
_comments.host: Bind address. Keep 127.0.0.1 unless you need LAN access
_comments.sessionStoreFile: Where the file-backed session map is persisted
_comments.claudeCommand: Command used to spawn Claude Code. Override for tests or non-standard installs
_comments.ask.allowedTools: Comma-separated CLI allowlist. Empty string disables all tools (recommended for ask)
_comments.task.defaultSessionMode: stateless | session | auto-last. Used when caller omits sessionMode
_comments.task.defaultWorkDir: Directory Claude runs in when caller omits workDir
_comments.task.allowedTools: Comma-separated CLI allowlist. Ignored when dangerouslySkipPermissions is true
_comments.task.dangerouslySkipPermissions: If true, passes --dangerously-skip-permissions and omits --allowed-tools. MAX BLAST RADIUS
_comments.task.sessionTtlMs: Sessions untouched longer than this are evicted by the background sweeper
